final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing detailed exploded-view illustration of a Sony A7 camera showing all its components and parts with labeled names.

Style/medium: needs a technical exploded-diagram aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be an exploded/deconstructed layout with all parts spread out and connected by guide lines to their labels
Subject: must include the Sony A7 camera fully disassembled into all its major and minor components, each labeled with its part name
Scene/backdrop: 
Lighting/mood: 
Color palette: 
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): must include part names as labels for each component (e.g. "sensor", "shutter", "lens mount", "battery", "viewfinder", "body shell", "grip", "control dial", "card slot", "mirror box", etc.)
Constraints: must preserve accurate representation of Sony A7 body structure and component layout; all parts must be clearly separated and individually labeled
Avoid:
